title: Device Settings - All settings can be changed
scenario: All non-toggle settings in Device Settings can be changed and updated correctly via picker selection
steps: 1. Pair the Poly Bluetooth headset with the mobile device and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. From the Home screen, tap the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
3. Tap any non-toggle option (e.g., Language, Sidetone, Voice Prompts, etc.) — a picker should display listing all available values.
4. Select any value from the picker — the picker closes and the option updates to reflect the newly selected value.
5. Repeat steps 3–4 for every available non-toggle option on that device.
6. Verify that all changes are properly displayed and persisted on the Device Settings screen.
expected: All non-toggle settings in Device Settings can be changed. Tapping a non-toggle option opens a picker with all available values. Selecting a value closes the picker and updates the option. All changes are properly displayed and persisted on the Device Settings screen.
